fields.name: Yeldo Mar Baselios College
fields.description: A premier institution for higher education.
fields.website_content: Yeldo Mar Baselios College is committed to providing quality education and fostering an environment of academic excellence and innovation.

fields.name: Elijah Institute of Management Studies (ELIMS)
fields.description: A premier management institute with over 44 years of legacy, dedicated to developing ethical and innovative managers.
fields.website_content: ELIMS has been a leader in management education for over four decades. We focus on practical business excellence and industry-aligned specializations.

fields.name: Al Shifa College of Arts and Science
fields.description: A premier institution of higher learning in Malapuram, affiliated with the University of Calicut, dedicated to academic excellence and student success through (Hons.) programmes.
fields.website_content: Al Shifa College of Arts & Science (ACAS) is a prominent institution providing value-based education. With modern facilities and a dedicated faculty, ACAS offers specialized Honours programmes designed to equip students for global challenges.

fields.name: Al Azhar Group of Institutions, Thodupuzha
fields.description: A massive educational ecosystem in Thodupuzha, Kerala, offering a wide array of professional and academic programmes across 12 institutions including Engineering, Arts & Science, Medical, and Dental sciences.
fields.website_content: Al-Azhar Group of Institutions is a premier educational hub established under the Noorul Islam Trust. With state-of-the-art infrastructure and a focus on holistic development, Al-Azhar provides a platform for students to excel in various disciplines from Medicine to Engineering.

fields.name: Nirmala College, Muvattupuzha
fields.description: Nirmala College, Muvattupuzha, is a prestigious co-educational institution affiliated to Mahatma Gandhi University, Kottayam. Established in 1965 and managed by the Diocese of Kothamangalam, the college offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes across arts, science, commerce, and management disciplines.
fields.website_content: Nirmala College, Muvattupuzha, stands as a centre of academic excellence in Kerala, offering holistic education rooted in Catholic values. As an autonomous college affiliated to Mahatma Gandhi University, the institution fosters critical thinking, research, and community development.

fields.name: Jai Bharath College of Management and Engineering Technology
fields.description: Jai Bharath College of Management and Engineering Technology (JBCMET), located in Vengola, Perumbavoor, Ernakulam, Kerala, is a premier technical institution established in 2009. Affiliated to APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (KTU) and approved by AICTE, the college offers a rich portfolio of engineering, management, and technology programmes.

fields.name: MES T.O. Abdulla Memorial College, Kunnukara
fields.description: MES T.O. Abdulla Memorial College, Kunnukara, is a premier self-financing institution established in 2004 under the Muslim Education Society (MES). Affiliated to Mahatma Gandhi University, Kottayam, the college offers a diverse range of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes across Commerce, Management, Computer Applications, Psychology, and English.
